purpose: Durable P20 aiflow queue for goctl real-project fixture replay and model/cache template depth, after P19 completed RPC release-train evidence and budget hold review. P20 intentionally prioritizes replayable go-zero/goctl project adoption evidence and DB/cache template smoke over expanding the CLI command surface.

submissionCommands: go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P20-01-P19-COMPLETION-HANDOFF -title "P19 completion handoff" -description "Mark P19 as the latest completed governance batch and open P20 for goctl real-project fixture replay and model/cache template depth." -kind governance -priority 100

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P20-02-GOCTL-REAL-PROJECT-FIXTURE-REPLAY -title "goctl real-project fixture replay" -description "Add a realistic go-zero/goctl-style project fixture replay contract, generated artifact smoke, deterministic repeat report, and gate." -kind governance -priority 99

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P20-03-MODEL-CACHE-TEMPLATE-DEPTH -title "model cache template depth" -description "Deepen generated SQL repository and cache-aside templates with transaction, pagination, optimistic lock, read/write split, Redis cache, smoke, and rollback evidence." -kind governance -priority 98

runtimeBlocker.evidence: go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow --help fails while aiflow is mid-migration because advisory report types diverge between controller, harness, and runtime packages.
runtimeBlocker.goflyFallback: Keep .aiflow as ignored runtime state, mirror the task queue here, and require each task to pass its gofly gate before commit.

aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P20 tasks are mirrored as durable docs/reference evidence while adjacent aiflow is unavailable; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P19 is treated as completed only when all three task rows in docs/reference/governance-p19-roadmap.json carry completion status, verification commands, and pending-current-commit placeholders owned by their per-task commits.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p19-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P19 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P19 from active RPC release-train evidence into the latest completed governance batch and open P20 as the next active aiflow batch for goctl replay and model/cache template depth.
tasks.deliverable: P19 completed task evidence, P20 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and adjacent-aiflow build blocker evidence.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P19 completion handoff and P20 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: goctl real-project fixture replay
tasks.objective: Move goctl compatibility from command and profile coverage into a realistic go-zero/goctl-style project replay fixture with deterministic generation, classified diffs, compile smoke, and rollback evidence.
tasks.deliverable: Real-project replay manifest, fixture inputs, generated artifact assertions, repeat replay report classification, temporary module compile smoke, and a dedicated make gate.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the replay fixture gate and goctl compatibility gate pass without changing unrelated CLI command surface

tasks.title: model cache template depth
tasks.objective: Deepen model/cache generation around go-zero sqlx/cache adoption expectations: transaction sample, bounded pagination, optimistic lock, read/write split, Redis cache-aside, observability, and generated project smoke.
tasks.deliverable: Generated model/cache template evidence, focused tests, db-cache productization contract updates, smoke gate wiring, and rollback notes.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after model/cache template tests and db-cache productization gate pass without adding generated-only dependencies to the root module
